description_long: A muscular adult male is depicted wearing a sleeveless camouflage tank top, brown cargo shorts, and sturdy black boots. He has a strong build with defined arms, and both forearms are adorned with wide, studded wristbands. The figure wears a two-tone baseball cap and has a clean-shaven face. His posture is upright with arms slightly extended outward, suggesting a neutral or idle stance. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for urban or outdoor environments.
description: A muscular adult male in a sleeveless camo tank top, cargo shorts, boots, and a baseball cap, with studded wristbands and a rugged build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the camo tank top, facial features, and both wristbands clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the muscular arm, profile of the cap, and the side of the shorts and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the camo tank top, shorts, and the back of the boots and cap.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right arm, wristband, and the side profile of the face and clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tank top, cargo shorts, baseball cap, studded wristbands
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
